summary: 0.6.38 fixes a generated-scene scrub regression by forcing demo3 progress sliders to start at zero instead of inheriting stale authored trigger values.
operatorSignals: Scrubbing felt jankier after the prior slice.
The likely theory was that the scene progress slider default was stale and fighting the media timeline because live readback is not wired yet.
actionsTaken: Confirmed all three generated progress sliders were carrying the same stale Trigger.value from the scene template.
Changed the demo3 builder so progress sliders always generate with value 0 while volume sliders keep value 1.
nonGoals: No text-display or stateful readback additions yet.
